raw_consumer_statement:
A charge for {$510.00} was made to our American Express credit card at XXXX on XX/XX/2023. 

We did not make this charge. It was the day before we left on a big trip, and we are quite confident that we did not visit XXXX on this date, nor did we place any online or phone order with XXXX. 

We gave this information to American Express, but they refused to credit the charge. No information or documentation was provided for the refusal. 

Separately, we contacted XXXX 's to ask them for an itemization of what was purchased, and they refused to give us that information.
